patterns: I want to book a room
can I book a hotel room
I want to make a reservation
i want to stay at your hotel
responses: Of course! I'd be happy to help you book a room. May I start with your name, please?
Perfect! Let's get you booked in. Could you tell me your full name to begin?
Thank you, {name}! When would you like to stay with us? Please share your check-in and check-out dates.
Great — noted {checkin} to {checkout} ({nights} night(s)). How many guests will be staying?
Got it — {guests} guest(s). Would you like to include breakfast with your stay? (yes/no)
Excellent — breakfast will be included. How would you like to pay: credit card, debit card, or pay at the hotel?
Understood — no breakfast. How would you like to pay: credit card, debit card, or pay at the hotel?
Payment method noted: {payment}. Let me summarise your booking...
Your booking is confirmed! Reference: {booking_id}. A confirmation has been prepared. Is there anything else I can help with?
No problem — let's start again. May I have your name, please?
Thank you for choosing Birol Hotel. Have a wonderful day!
You're welcome! We look forward to hosting you. Safe travels!
You're most welcome! Anything else I can help with?
My pleasure! Let me know if you need anything else.
Here is our upcoming availability at Birol Hotel:

**I'm Aria — your Birol Hotel concierge.** Here's what I can help with:

**Booking**
• Book a room *(say "book a room")*
• Room availability for upcoming months
• See your existing bookings

**The hotel**
• Check-in & check-out times
• Breakfast hours
• Wi-Fi, parking, pet policy
• Amenities (spa, pool, gym)
• Cancellation policy · contact

**Istanbul**
• Top places to visit
• Restaurant recommendations
• Getting to/from the airport
• Currency, language, tipping
• Neighbourhood & emergencies

Ask in your own words — I'll do my best.

patterns: what are the best places to visit in istanbul
what are the best places to visit
responses:
**Top places to visit in Istanbul:**

**Old City · Sultanahmet**
• **Hagia Sophia** — 6th-century cathedral turned mosque
• **Blue Mosque** — the iconic six-minaret mosque
• **Topkapı Palace** — Ottoman sultans' residence
• **Basilica Cistern** — underground Byzantine water cistern
• **Grand Bazaar** — 4,000 shops under one roof

**Galata · Beyoğlu**
• **Galata Tower** — 360° views of the city
• **İstiklal Street** — grand pedestrian shopping avenue
• **Dolmabahçe Palace** — 19th-century imperial palace

**On the water**
• **Bosphorus cruise** — Europe and Asia in one afternoon
• **Prince's Islands** — ferry to car-free islands and pine forests

I can book a private guide or cruise through concierge — just ask.

**Dining in Istanbul:**

**Fine dining**
• **Mikla** — modern Turkish with a Bosphorus skyline
• **Neolokal** — foraged Anatolian tasting menu
• **Aheste** — contemporary mezes in Karaköy

**Classic Turkish**
• **Çiya Sofrası** (Kadıköy) — regional cuisine, museum-on-a-plate
• **Karaköy Lokantası** — breathtaking tiles, classic meze
• **Pandeli** — inside the Spice Bazaar since 1901

**Street food**
• **Balık ekmek** under Galata Bridge (fish sandwiches)
• **Midye dolma** along İstiklal (stuffed mussels)
• **Lahmacun** at Halil Lahmacun, Kadıköy

Ask the concierge to book a table — same-day reservations are usually possible.

patterns: how to get to the airport
how do i get to the hotel
how do i reach the hotel
responses:
**Getting to/from Istanbul airport:**

• **Private hotel transfer** — we can arrange a car · ~€45 from IST or €35 from SAW. Ask at reception.
• **HAVAIST bus** — frequent service · ~₺220 from IST to Taksim (15 min walk to us)
• **Metro + walk** — M11 from IST to Gayrettepe, then M2 to Şişhane, ~10 min walk. Cheapest option.
• **Taxi** — roughly ₺700–900 from IST, ₺450–600 from SAW. Use the airport's official counter.

Share your arrival details and I'll pre-arrange a pickup.

**Check-in & check-out:**

• **Check-in:** from **2:00 PM**
• **Check-out:** until **12:00 noon**

**Flexibility**
• *Early check-in* subject to availability — often possible if you arrive before noon; we'll do our best.
• *Late check-out* until 3 PM is usually complimentary on request; later may carry a half-day charge.

Luggage storage is free before and after your stay.

**Breakfast** is served **07:00–10:30** daily in the ground-floor restaurant (08:00–11:00 on weekends).

Expect a full Turkish spread — cheeses, olives, honeycomb, menemen, fresh börek, seasonal fruit, and of course strong Turkish tea. Continental options and a daily chef's special round it out.

Room service breakfast is available 06:30–11:00 for a small tray charge.

**Complimentary high-speed Wi-Fi** is available throughout the hotel.

• **Network:** `BirolHotel-Guest`
• **Password:** given on your key-card sleeve at check-in
• **Premium tier:** free for our guests — no paywall, no signup.

Having trouble? Dial 0 from any phone and our tech desk will get you online.

**Parking** is available at the hotel.

• **Valet** — 24/7 at the main entrance, **₺250 / night**
• **Self-park** — secure basement garage, **₺180 / night** (limited spaces)
• **EV charging** — two Type-2 stations, included for valet guests

Street parking in our neighbourhood is metered and rare — valet is the easiest option.

**Birol Hotel amenities:**

• **Hammam & spa** — traditional Turkish bath, three treatment rooms. 10 am–10 pm.
• **Rooftop pool** — heated year-round, Bosphorus views. 7 am–9 pm.
• **Fitness center** — 24/7, Technogym equipment, free weights, cardio
• **Library bar** — signature cocktails, 5 pm–1 am
• **Restaurant** — breakfast daily · dinner Tue–Sun · closed Monday evenings
• **24/7 concierge** — reservations, tickets, guides, private transport
• **Laundry & dry-cleaning** — same-day if collected before 9 am

Anything specific you'd like to book?

**Cancellation policy:**

• **Free cancellation** up to **48 hours** before check-in.
• Within 48 hours: **one night's charge**.
• No-show: **full stay charged.**

**Changes** (dates, guests, room type) are free of charge up to 24 hours before arrival — subject to availability.

To cancel or amend, reply with your booking reference (starts with BH-) or call +90 (0) 212 000 0000.

**Yes — we're pet-friendly**, with a little advance notice.

• **Dogs & cats** welcome in standard and deluxe rooms
• **Weight limit:** up to 15 kg per pet, max 2 pets per room
• **Fee:** ₺200 / night per pet (includes a cosy bed and bowls)
• Please mention your pet when booking so we can assign a ground-floor room near the garden.

We can also arrange dog-walkers and a local vet on request.

**Currency in Istanbul:**

• Local currency is the **Turkish Lira (₺ / TRY)**
• Major credit cards (**Visa, Mastercard, Amex**) are widely accepted
• Contactless payment is ubiquitous — tap your phone at most places
• ATMs on every corner — **Garanti, İş Bankası, and Yapı Kredi** are reliable
• Some smaller cafés, taxis, and markets are cash-only; carry ~₺500 in small notes

We can exchange USD/EUR at the front desk at competitive rates.

**Tipping in Istanbul:**

• **Restaurants & cafés** — **10%** is customary; a bit more for great service. Check if service is already included ("servis dahil").
• **Taxis** — round up to the nearest ₺10; no expectation of more.
• **Hotel staff** — ₺50–100 for the porter, ₺50/day for housekeeping left on the pillow.
• **Tour guides** — ₺200–400 per day if you're enjoying the tour.
• **Hammam** — ₺100–200 for the tellak (masseur).

Tips in cash are most appreciated.

**Languages at the Birol Hotel:**

• **Turkish** — our house language
• **English** — all front-desk, concierge and restaurant staff are fluent
• **German, French, Arabic** — at least one colleague on each shift
• **Russian, Spanish** — available with a little notice

On the street, English works well in tourist areas; a few phrases of Turkish (*merhaba* — hello · *teşekkürler* — thanks) go a very long way.

**Birol Hotel — contact & location:**

• **Address:** Karaköy Mahallesi, near the Galata Tower, Beyoğlu / İstanbul
• **Phone:** +90 (0) 212 000 0000 (24/7)
• **Email:** booking@birolhotel.example
• **Concierge:** concierge@birolhotel.example

We're a 10-minute walk from Galata Tower, 15 minutes from İstiklal, and 20 minutes by car from the Old City. Nearest metro: **Şişhane (M2)**.

**Around the hotel — Karaköy & Galata:**

We sit in one of Istanbul's most creative neighbourhoods — cobblestone streets, design shops, third-wave cafés, and a thriving gallery scene.

**On foot from the hotel**
• **Galata Tower** — 5 min
• **Karaköy Güllüoğlu** (legendary baklava) — 6 min
• **Istanbul Modern** (contemporary art museum) — 7 min
• **Galata Bridge** (great sunset spot) — 8 min
• **İstiklal Street** — 12 min

**Across the bridge** — Sultanahmet and the Grand Bazaar are 20 min by tram.

**Emergency numbers in Turkey (all free, 24/7):**

• **112** — Medical emergency / ambulance *(also works for police and fire)*
• **155** — Police
• **110** — Fire department
• **156** — Coast guard

**From the hotel:** dial **0** from any room phone or press the red button on the bedside — a member of staff will be with you within a minute, and we'll coordinate the ambulance and hospital.

English-speaking hospital nearby: **American Hospital (Amerikan Hastanesi)** — +90 212 444 37 77.
I'm afraid that's outside what I can help with — I focus on **Birol Hotel** bookings and **Istanbul** travel tips. Tap **Help** to see everything I can answer, or try asking another way.
